summary: LoveAssist AI MVP — full backend + frontend smoke test. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases pass (auth, subscription, AI suggestions/first-message/screenshot, exclusive-mode gating, safety filter, history CRUD, settings). Frontend: login -> demo session -> home -> /suggest (4 cards with Copy) -> /first-message (4 openers) -> /premium (upgrade flips to active, banner says 'Premium activated') -> /profile (language + default mode pickers, sign out returns to /login) -> /history (saved items visible). No red screen, no console errors, no critical bugs found. Safety filter correctly refuses explicit NSFW prompts and produces tasteful suggestions only.

issues: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — non-blocking RN web deprecation

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated `props.pointerEvents` usage detected (warning emitted on /login). Migrate to `style.pointerEvents`. Likely in a 3rd-party component or theme wrapper; non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Address the React Native Web deprecation warning by replacing `pointerEvents` prop with `style={{ pointerEvents: ... }}` to silence console warning.

(Optional) Consider exposing testIDs on the bottom tab bar (home-tab, history-tab, premium-tab, profile-tab) for more robust navigation tests; navigation currently works via direct URL routing in Expo Router.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes `_id` from all Mongo reads via projection `{"_id": 0}` — good.
Auth: get_user_from_token correctly enforces expires_at (UTC-aware comparison via _aware helper).
AI endpoints wrap call_claude in try/except and re-raise HTTPException; returns 500 only for unexpected errors — good.
Safety prompt is included on every system message and verified empirically to refuse explicit content.
Stripe upgrade endpoint is correctly labelled 'simulated' (per requirement). MOCKED — no real payment.
Exclusive mode gating correctly returns 402 when subscription absent/expired (verified with isolated test that deletes the sub from MongoDB).
server.py is 536 lines — within the 700-line guideline; modular structure clear.
seed_data_creation: Per-test isolated demo users via /api/auth/dev-login using TEST_-prefixed emails. History items created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up within their tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL pulled from frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Pytest fixtures in conftest.py auto-load env. Use /api/auth/dev-login with TEST_-prefixed emails to create disposable users (every new user auto-gets 7d trial). To test exclusive 402 path, delete the user's subscription doc directly from Mongo. The /api/ai/screenshot endpoint requires a meaningful JPEG (Claude rejects 1x1 pixels with 'Could not process image'); use PIL to generate a ~400x300 chat-like JPEG.
